exclude.@opensearch-project/opensearch: Major version 3.x upgrade deferred - requires API migration
exclude.babel-plugin-istanbul: Major version 7.x upgrade deferred - requires testing infrastructure changes
exclude.chai: Major version 6.x is ESM-only, requires test infrastructure migration
exclude.cucumber: Migration to @cucumber/cucumber deferred - significant API changes
exclude.dotenv: Major version 17.x upgrade deferred - API changes
exclude.eslint-config-prettier: Version 10.x requires ESLint 9 flat config migration
exclude.eslint-plugin-promise: Version 7.x requires ESLint 9 flat config migration
exclude.eslint-plugin-security: Version 4.x requires ESLint 9 flat config migration
exclude.eslint-plugin-unicorn: Version 63.x requires ESLint 9 flat config migration
exclude.express: Major version 5.x upgrade deferred - significant API breaking changes
exclude.glob: Major version 13.x upgrade deferred - API changes
exclude.glob-promise: Major version 6.x upgrade deferred - follows glob major version
exclude.got: Major version 14.x is ESM-only, consider fetch replacement
exclude.keyv: Major version 5.x upgrade deferred - requires storage adapter changes
exclude.keyv-file: Major version 5.x upgrade deferred - requires keyv 5.x
